steps.text:
Welcome to Claudzooks!

You're about to learn how to use the terminal — a powerful, text-based way to control your computer. By the end, you'll build a real web page using an AI coding assistant.

The terminal is different from what you're used to. There's no mouse, no clicking, no dragging. Everything happens through the keyboard.

Here's what you'll learn:

- Lessons 1–5: Terminal basics — navigating folders, creating files, reading and editing text
- Lesson 6: Introduction to Claude Code, an AI coding assistant
- Lesson 7: Build a real web app with AI

No experience needed. Let's go!
